name: aspect-ratio
title: Aspect Ratio
description: A dependency-free wrapper that gives media or other content a preferred width-to-height ratio using native CSS while leaving accessible semantics to its child.
useWhen: Keeping image, map, video, chart, or preview geometry stable while responsive width changes
Reserving predictable media space before an asset loads to reduce layout shift
Presenting a consistent gallery or card-media crop while the child controls object-fit
avoidWhen: The content's natural dimensions communicate useful information and should not be cropped or constrained
Text or interactive content may grow beyond the ratio — fixed media geometry can clip content or focus indicators
A fixed height is required independently of width
Using the ratio wrapper as a substitute for image alt text, video captions, or other child semantics

keyboard: Aspect Ratio is not interactive and adds no tab stop or keyboard behavior
Keyboard behavior and focus indicators belong to interactive descendants
The wrapper adds no role or accessible name; child media retains its native semantics
